info.name: Factset Get Accounts and Sub-directories in a Directory

params.name: path
params.description: The directory to get the accounts and sub-directories in

items.docs: This endpoint looks up all ACCT and ACTM files and sub-directories in a given directory.
This endpoint lists all the currencies that can be applied to any calculation.

info.name: Factset Create and Run Npo Optimization

items.docs:
This endpoint creates and runs NPO optimization specified in the POST body parameters.
            
Remarks:
            
*	Any settings in POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the strategy document.

info.name: Factset Get Npo Optimization Parameters by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run NPO optimization endpoint

items.docs: This is the endpoint that returns the optimization parameters passed for an optimization.

info.name: Factset Create or Update Npo Optimization and Run It.

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run NPO optimization endpoint

items.docs: This endpoint updates and run the NPO optimization specified in the PUT body parameters. It also allows the creation of new NPO optimization with custom id.

info.name: Factset Cancel Npo Optimization by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run NPO optimization endpoint

items.docs: This is the endpoint to cancel a previously submitted optimization.

info.name: Factset Get Npo Optimization Status by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run NPO optimization endpoint

items.docs:
This is the endpoint to check on the progress of a previously requested optimization.
If the optimization has finished computing, the body of the response will contain result in JSON.
Otherwise, the optimization is still running and the X-FactSet-Api-PickUp-Progress header will contain a progress percentage.

info.name: Factset Get Npo Optimization Result by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Get NPO optimization status by id endpoint

items.docs: This is the endpoint to get the result of a previously requested optimization.

info.name: Factset Get Northfield Strategy Documents and Sub-directories in a Directory

params.name: path
params.description: The directory to get the strategy documents and sub-directories in

items.docs: This endpoint looks up all Northfield strategy documents and sub-directories in a given directory.
